---
title: "Are dark-backed birds darker overall?"
author: "Ore, MJ."
date: "2025-03-10"
output: rmarkdown::github_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```


```{r prep data - geographic variation in color, echo = FALSE}

library(tidyverse)
library(here)
library(viridis)

here::i_am("R_scripts/Color_correlations.Rmd")

avg_img <- read.csv(here("data/BTBW_whole_specimen_Image_Analysis_measurements_averaged_allpop.csv"))

## select only brightness for ASY males
lum <- avg_img %>% 
  dplyr::select(ID, pl_code, dblMean, dblSD, uvMean, uvSD, area, Age, pop, lat, lon, Year, prepartor) %>% 
  filter(Age == "ASY")

lum_summarized <- lum %>%
  group_by(ID, Age, pop, lat, lon,Year, prepartor, pl_code) %>%
  summarise(
    dblMean = mean(dblMean),
    dblSD = mean(dblSD),
    uvMean = mean(uvMean),
    uvSD = mean(uvSD),
    area = mean(area),
    .groups = 'drop'
  )

lum_wide <- lum_summarized %>% 
  pivot_wider(names_from = pl_code, values_from = c(dblMean, dblSD, uvMean, uvSD, area), names_sep = "_" )

```

#crown

```{r crown, echo = F}
library(lmerTest)

# check for normality
hist(lum_wide$dblMean_d)
hist(lum_wide$dblMean_c)

z <- lmerTest::lmer(dblMean_c ~ dblMean_d + (1|Year) + (1|prepartor), data = lum_wide, na.action = na.exclude) 
summary(z)

ggplot(lum_wide)+
  geom_point(aes(x = dblMean_d, y = dblMean_c, col = lat))+
  scale_color_viridis_c(direction = -1)+
  geom_smooth(aes(x = dblMean_d, y = dblMean_c), method = "lm", col = "black")+
  labs(x = "Dorsum Brightness", y = "Crown Brightness")+
  theme_classic()

```

#wingspot

```{r wingspot}

library(lmerTest)

# check for normality
hist(lum_wide$dblMean_d)
hist(lum_wide$dblMean_w)

z <- lmerTest::lmer(dblMean_w ~ dblMean_d + (1|Year) + (1|prepartor), data = lum_wide, na.action = na.exclude) 
summary(z)

ggplot(lum_wide)+
  geom_point(aes(x = dblMean_d, y = dblMean_w, col = lat))+
  scale_color_viridis_c(direction = -1)+
  geom_smooth(aes(x = dblMean_d, y = dblMean_w), method = "lm", col = "black")+
  labs(x = "Dorsum Brightness", y = "Wingspot Brightness")+
  theme_classic()

```

#throat

```{r throat}

library(lmerTest)

# check for normality
hist(lum_wide$dblMean_d)
hist(lum_wide$dblMean_t)

z <- lmerTest::lmer(dblMean_t ~ dblMean_d + (1|Year) + (1|prepartor), data = lum_wide, na.action = na.exclude) 
summary(z)

ggplot(lum_wide)+
  geom_point(aes(x = dblMean_d, y = dblMean_t, col = lat))+
  scale_color_viridis_c(direction = -1)+
  geom_smooth(aes(x = dblMean_d, y = dblMean_t), method = "lm", col = "black")+
  labs(x = "Dorsum Brightness", y = "Throat Brightness")+
  theme_classic()

```

#marginal covert

```{r coverts}

library(lmerTest)

# check for normality
hist(lum_wide$dblMean_d)
hist(lum_wide$dblMean_o)

z <- lmerTest::lmer(dblMean_o ~ dblMean_d + (1|Year) + (1|prepartor), data = lum_wide, na.action = na.exclude) 
summary(z)

ggplot(lum_wide)+
  geom_point(aes(x = dblMean_d, y = dblMean_o, col = lat))+
  scale_color_viridis_c(direction = -1)+
  geom_smooth(aes(x = dblMean_d, y = dblMean_o), method = "lm", col = "black")+
  labs(x = "Dorsum Brightness", y = "Covert Brightness")+
  theme_classic()

```

#belly

```{r belly}

library(lmerTest)

# check for normality
hist(lum_wide$dblMean_d)
hist(lum_wide$dblMean_b)

z <- lmerTest::lmer(dblMean_b ~ dblMean_d + (1|Year) + (1|prepartor), data = lum_wide, na.action = na.exclude) 
summary(z)

ggplot(lum_wide)+
  geom_point(aes(x = dblMean_d, y = dblMean_b, col = lat))+
  scale_color_viridis_c(direction = -1)+
  geom_smooth(aes(x = dblMean_d, y = dblMean_b), method = "lm", col = "black")+
  labs(x = "Dorsum Brightness", y = "Belly Brightness")+
  theme_classic()

```
